# Severus in Caledonia; ANTIQVITAS master plan §9; CAM-SEV; recipient=ROM

	type = country_event
	title = antq_m10_third.3000.title
	desc = antq_m10_third.3000.desc
	outcome = neutral
	fire_only_once = yes
	image = "gfx/interface/illustrations/event/antq_severus_caledonia.dds"
	dynamic_historical_event = {
		tag = XAA
		from = 208.1.1
		to = 212.1.1
		monthly_chance = 100
	}
	option = {
		name = antq_m10_third.3000.a
		historical_option = yes
		add_prestige = prestige_mild_bonus
	}
}

	desc = antq_m10_third.3001.desc
	outcome = neutral
	fire_only_once = yes
	image = "gfx/interface/illustrations/event/antq_constitutio_antoniniana.dds"
	dynamic_historical_event = {
		tag = XAA
		from = 212.1.1
		to = 213.1.1
		monthly_chance = 100
	}
	option = {
		name = antq_m10_third.3001.a
		historical_option = yes
		remove_policy = policy:antq_peregrini_status
		add_policy = policy:antq_universal_citizenship
		add_prestige = prestige_mild_bonus
	}
}

	fire_only_once = yes
	dynamic_historical_event = {
		tag = XAH
		from = 224.1.1
		to = 225.1.1
		monthly_chance = 100
	}
	option = {
		name = antq_m10_third.3004.a
		historical_option = yes
		change_tag_cosmetic = { tag = SAS }

}
